description: LLM uses pipeline() for sequential stages with concurrent items

criteria.name: uses_pipeline
criteria.description: Script uses pipeline() with items and stages
criteria.pass_condition: Script calls pipeline() with at least 2 items and 2 stage functions.

criteria.name: correct_pipeline_syntax
criteria.description: pipeline() receives array of items then stage functions, not promises
criteria.pass_condition: First arg to pipeline() is an array. Subsequent args are functions.

criteria.name: stages_sequential
criteria.description: Each item goes through stages in order (stage 2 receives stage 1 output)
criteria.pass_condition: Second stage function uses the first stage's output (the prev parameter).

criteria.name: within_registerPhase
criteria.description: pipeline() used inside a registerPhase body
criteria.pass_condition: The pipeline call is inside a registerPhase body.

criteria.name: summary_phase
criteria.description: A summary phase after the pipeline phase
criteria.pass_condition: Script has a separate phase after the pipeline phase.

criteria.name: sensible_distribution
criteria.description: The pipeline produces meaningful size classifications
criteria.pass_condition: Result shows line counts or size categories for the files.
